memoryArtifacts.headline: The Settlers of the Beekman Patent VII - The Lanphere Family, George Lanphere
memoryArtifacts.description: Provides details on George his wife Jane Hulet and their children. It also provides details on Seth Lanphere their son and his wife Sarah Pendleton and their children.

popularStory.headline: George Lanphere c.1638 - 1731
popularStory.description:
About George Lanphere (Lanphear)
Sharon Fehr:
GOOGLE "Eve of St. Bartholomew Massacre."

PETER BUTTON[7] married MARY LANPHEAR [7]

Her father was GEORGE LANPHEAR [6], many spellings, probably f …

zh.lifeSummary: 當George Lamphere於大約1642年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Richard Lanphear - Lanphere49歲，母親Averina Vibert25歲。他和Mrs. George Lamphere至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1731年10月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利享年90歲，埋葬在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利利維 本德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Lamphere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Lanfear  .

variants.name: Lanfear
meanings: Welsh and English: habitational name from any of the many places in Wales called Llanfair ‘church of Saint Mary’, from Welsh llan ‘church’ + Mair ‘Mary’, for example Llanfair Caereinion (Montgomeryshire). Compare Lamphear , Lamphere , Lamphier , Lanfair , Lanphear , Lanpher , Lanphere , and Lanphier .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When George Lamphere was born about 1642, in London, England, his father, Richard Lanphear - Lanphere, was 49 and his mother, Averina Vibert, was 25. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Mrs. George Lamphere. He died on 6 October 1731, in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 90, and was buried in River Bend Cemetery, Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States.

Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1731, à Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à River Bend Cemetery, Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Lamphere è nato il circa 1642 nel London, England, il suo padre, Richard Lanphear - Lanphere, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Averina Vibert, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Mrs. George Lamphere. Morì il 6 ottobre 1731, nel Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a River Bend Cemetery, Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: George Lamphereが約1642年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Richard Lanphear - Lanphereは49歳，母Averina Vibertは25歳であった。彼はMrs. George Lamphereとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1731年10月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドキングズウエステルリーで90歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーリバー ベンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Lamphere(이)가 대략 1642년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Lanphear - Lanphere(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Averina Vibert(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mrs. George Lamphere(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1731년 10월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리 라이버 벤드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Lamphere nasceu aproximadamente 1642, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Lanphear - Lanphere, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Averina Vibert, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Mrs. George Lamphere. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1731, em Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em River Bend Cemetery, Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Lamphere родился около 1642 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Lanphear - Lanphere было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Averina Vibert, 25. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Mrs. George Lamphere. Он умер 6 октября 1731 г. в местности вестирли, кингс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности ривир бенд кеметири, вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Lamphere nació aproximadamente 1642, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Lanphear - Lanphere, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Averina Vibert, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Mrs. George Lamphere. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1731, en Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en River Bend Cemetery, Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
